title: Gambling Addiction Support Groups - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Gambling Addiction Support Groups 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter No Filter Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF GAMBLERS ANONYMOUS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about 12-step support groups and other resources related to the topic of problem gambling. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (855) 222-5542 855-2 Visit Website More Details PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SPRINGFIELD EDUCATION OFFICE BEHAVIORAL HEALTH & EDUCATION SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provide individual and group therapy for individuals seeking treatment for addictions, including problem gambling. Also provide peer, educational, and prevention services for adults, youth, and families. 1621 Centennial Boulevard Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Unrestricted; primarily focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: 11am-9pm Monday-Friday (541) 686-8483 2 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SMART RECOVERY USA ADDICTION SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support groups and peer counseling to help individuals gain independence from addiction and addictive behaviors, including substance use disorder, gambling addiction, and sexual addiction. Offers a "no higher power" approach. The program has four aspects: building motivation, coping with urges, problem-solving, and developing a balanced lifestyle. 7304 Mentor Avenue Suite F Mentor, OH 44060 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by meeting Email (440) 951-5357 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES
